title: detarium macrocarpum
intro: Detarium macrocarpum, also known as the umbrella tree or detarium, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of detarium macrocarpum include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and expectorant. Detarium macrocarpum can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and its bark, leaves, and roots can be used to make various herbal preparations.
